subject: [RFC PATCH 0/6] mm/memcontrol: Make memcg limits tier-aware

reviews.author: Michal Hocko
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about thrashing and reclaim activity, suggesting that the effective toptier memory limits should be exposed as a new sysfs file. Also mentioned scenarios where reclaim activity occurs even when there is available memory.

reviews.author: Joshua Hahn
reviews.summary: Acknowledged Michal's concerns and suggested two potential components to address thrashing: throttling promotions when toptier is facing cgroup-local pressure, and background balancing between nodes. Also mentioned that enforcing limits based on capacity could be a feasible solution.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: The patch aims to make memcg limits tier-aware, addressing concerns around thrashing and reclaim activity.
